headline: Op-ed: What $5 billion humanoid robots taught me about risk, jobs and the future of the economy
summary: Apptronik has risen in value from $15 million to $5 billion and now has Google DeepMind as a partner. There's a very big idea backing the robotics startup.

headline: Ronal Deal Highlights Rockwell Automation’s Growing Role In Industrial Cybersecurity
summary: Ronal Group has adopted Rockwell Automation's secure remote access technology for its global operations. The deployment focuses on cybersecurity, regulatory compliance, and operational resilience across Ronal's facilities. Rockwell Automation's solution supports alignment with frameworks such as NIS2 for industrial customers. For investors looking at NYSE:ROK, this rollout sits directly in Rockwell Automation's core role of supplying industrial automation and digital infrastructure to large...
